mapper.update: update tmp_compliance_result t set t.is_filter = '1' where t.id = #{id}
update tmp_compliance_result t set t.END_DATE = #{endDate} where t.id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.T_DATE, A.LG_NAME, A.LE_TYPE, A.L_FUND_ID, A.ACT_LAYER_NAME, A.MANAGER, A.le_objects, A.OBJECTS, A.LE_CODE, A.le_code_o32, A.I_CODE, A.M_TYPE, A.LE_NAME, A.COMPLIANCE, A.RESULT, A.FIRST_DATE, A.CONTINUE_DATE, A.END_DATE, nvl(t.超标原因,' ') as remark FROM TMP_COMPLIANCE_RESULT A LEFT JOIN timp_compliance_reason t ON a.t_date = t.监控日期 AND a.le_code = t.风控编号 AND a.L_FUND_ID = t.基金代码 AND a.le_objects = t.监控对象 WHERE A.ID = #{id}

SELECT A.ID, A.T_DATE, A.LG_NAME, A.LE_TYPE, A.L_FUND_ID, A.ACT_LAYER_NAME, A.MANAGER, A.OBJECTS, A.LE_CODE, A.LE_NAME, A.COMPLIANCE, A.RESULT, A.FIRST_DATE, A.CONTINUE_DATE, A.END_DATE, nvl(t.超标原因,' ') as remark FROM TMP_COMPLIANCE_RESULT A LEFT JOIN timp_compliance_reason t ON a.t_date = t.监控日期 AND a.le_code = t.风控编号 AND a.L_FUND_ID = t.基金代码 AND a.le_objects = t.监控对象 WHERE A.IS_FILTER = '0' AND A.T_DATE = #{t_date} AND A.LG_NAME = #{lg_name} AND A.LE_TYPE = #{le_type} ORDER BY A.LG_NAME DESC,A.LE_TYPE,A.MANAGER

SELECT A.ID, A.T_DATE, A.LG_NAME, A.LE_TYPE, A.L_FUND_ID, A.ACT_LAYER_NAME, A.MANAGER, A.OBJECTS, A.LE_CODE, A.LE_NAME, A.COMPLIANCE, A.RESULT, A.FIRST_DATE, A.CONTINUE_DATE, A.END_DATE, nvl(t.超标原因,' ') as remark FROM TMP_COMPLIANCE_RESULT A LEFT JOIN timp_compliance_reason t ON a.t_date = t.监控日期 AND a.le_code = t.风控编号 AND a.L_FUND_ID = t.基金代码 AND a.le_objects = t.监控对象 WHERE A.IS_FILTER = '0' AND A.T_DATE = #{t_date} AND A.LG_NAME = #{lg_name} AND A.LE_TYPE != #{le_type} ORDER BY A.LG_NAME DESC,A.LE_TYPE,A.MANAGER
mapper.insert: insert into TMP_COMPLIANCE_RESULT (T_DATE, L_FUND_ID, ACT_LAYER_NAME, LE_OBJECTS, LE_CODE, LE_CODE_O32, LE_NAME, FIRST_DATE, COMPLIANCE, I_CODE, I_NAME, M_TYPE, RESULT, END_DATE, LE_TYPE, STATUS, IS_FILTER, RESIDUE_TIME, CONTINUE_DATE, BASE_DATE, MANAGER, LG_NAME, P_ID, OBJECTS, RESULT_TYPE) values (#{tDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lFundId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actLayerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leObjects,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leCodeO32,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{compliance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{iCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{iName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{leType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isFilter,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{residueTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{continueDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{baseDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{manager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objects,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultType,jdbcType=CHAR})
